description: Oracle vector provenance for jcsfloat golden test data
oracle_function: ECMA-262 String(x) (§6.1.6.1.20, formerly §7.1.12.1) via V8 Number::toString
notes: String(x) output is expected to be stable across V8 versions based on ECMA-262 normative requirements, but verified only against V8 12.9.202.28.
Reproducibility verified by regenerating vectors and comparing SHA-256 checksums.
Total oracle coverage: 286362 unique IEEE 754 binary64 values including subnormals, powers of two, and RFC 8785 Appendix B examples.
